shortBio: From QA Engineer to Automation Architect — building intelligent testing solutions and exploring the future of Agentic AI.
fullBio:
Over the past 10 years, I've grown from a QA Engineer writing test cases to an Automation Engineer building intelligent testing solutions and exploring the future of Agentic AI. My journey has taken me across enterprise applications, IoT platforms, and modern SaaS products, where I've built automation frameworks, led quality engineering teams, and served as a Scrum Master focused on enabling high-performing teams.

Today, my curiosity extends beyond traditional automation. I'm actively working with LangChain, MCP (Model Context Protocol), local LLMs, DeepEval, and AI-assisted testing to explore how engineering teams can build software faster without compromising quality. I enjoy experimenting, sharing what I learn through technical blogs and LinkedIn, and turning new ideas into practical proof of concepts.

I believe quality starts long before execution. Whether it's applying Shift Left principles, improving developer workflows, or using AI to eliminate repetitive tasks, my goal is always the same: help teams spend less time on manual effort and more time solving meaningful engineering problems.

I'm particularly interested in the intersection of Quality Engineering, Automation, and Agentic AI, where intelligent systems don't replace engineers — they amplify what great engineers can accomplish.

subsections.heading: AI Engineering & Orchestration
items: Orchestration: LangChain, RAG systems, Model Context Protocol (MCP)
LLM Evaluation: DeepEval, Prompt Engineering, Local LLMs (Ollama)
Tools: GitHub Copilot, Azure AI, GenSpark

subsections.heading: Test Automation & Architecture
items: Strategy: Custom framework design, hybrid & data-driven architectures

subsections.heading: Full-Stack & Cloud Infrastructure
items: Development: Java, Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, Spring Boot, React
CI/CD: Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps

subsections.heading: Agile Leadership & Process
items: Roles: Certified Scrum Master (PSM I, CSM), Technical Lead
Action: Sprint planning, unblocking teams, retrospective facilitation
Culture: Cross-functional collaboration, mentoring, quality advocacy

sections.title: What Drives Me
sections.content: I believe quality starts long before execution. Whether it's applying Shift Left principles, improving developer workflows, or using AI to eliminate repetitive tasks, my goal is always the same: help teams spend less time on manual effort and more time solving meaningful engineering problems.

sections.title: Automation & Agent Engineering
sections.content: I design and build automation platforms that transform manual and repetitive workflows into intelligent, scalable systems.

items.label: Workflow Automation Platforms
items.description: Architecting end-to-end automation platforms with test data synthesis, E2E test flows, one-click execution, and unified workflow validation spaces

items.label: AI-Powered Automation
items.description: Leveraging LangChain, LLMs, and AI tools to intelligently design, optimize, and automate complex workflows and reduce manual effort by 80+%

items.label: Workflow Orchestration & Integration
items.description: Building robust automation ecosystems that integrate with CI/CD, testing tools, and enterprise systems for seamless workflow execution

items.label: Agent Development
items.description: Exploring agentic automation systems using Agent Framework and LLM orchestration to create self-directed, intelligent workflow agents

sections.title: AI-Native Engineering
sections.content: I'm actively transitioning from traditional automation toward AI-driven engineering. I build systems for testing AI and LLMs — not just using AI tools, but creating systems that evaluate and ensure their reliability and safety.

items.label: RAG Systems
items.description: Building retrieval-augmented assistants with local LLMs for domain-specific testing and validations

items.label: LLM Reliability & Safety
items.description: Implementing DeepEval and evaluation pipelines to measure model quality, robustness, and fairness

items.label: MCP & Tooling Integrations
items.description: Prototyping Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations that embed LLMs into IDEs and testing workflows

items.label: Developer Velocity
items.description: Leveraging Copilot and AI assistant patterns to accelerate delivery while maintaining architectural rigor

sections.title: The Intersection
sections.content: I'm particularly interested in the intersection of Quality Engineering, Automation, and Agentic AI, where intelligent systems don't replace engineers — they amplify what great engineers can accomplish.
